# Welcome to AI Dispatcher

AI Dispatcher is an intelligent dispatch optimization platform that helps field service companies assign the right technician to every job — automatically.

## What AI Dispatcher Does

- **Smart Job Assignment** — AI analyzes technician skills, location, availability, and workload to recommend optimal assignments
- **Multi-Provider Support** — Connects with FieldCamp, Jobber, HouseCallPro, and ServiceTrade
- **Real-Time Optimization** — Continuously re-optimizes schedules as new jobs arrive and conditions change
- **Dispatcher Dashboard** — Visual calendar, capacity planning, and one-click approval of AI suggestions

## Who It's For

AI Dispatcher is built for dispatch managers and operations teams at field service companies — HVAC, plumbing, electrical, landscaping, and more. No technical expertise required.
